published_prior_art.cite: LuedtkeSofryginVanderLaanCarone2017: longitudinal G-formula/backward-regression representation and sequential double robustness.
No matching causal result identified; the displayed Hölder conclusion is the standard bounded-linear-integral consequence of the stated L1-valued kernel regularity.

LuedtkeSofryginVanderLaanCarone2017 supplies first-order longitudinal SDR, while RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2008 and RobinsLiMukherjeeTchetgenVanderVaart2017 provide single-time HOIF constructions, not this composed two-period rate.
RobinsTchetgenLiVanderVaart2009 proves the two-convex-mixture device for multiparameter semiparametric functionals, but not a legal transition-induced longitudinal mixture.
CinelliFellerImbensKennedyMagliacaneZubizarreta2025, §3.5, identifies time-varying-treatment optimality outside the root-n regime as open.
No directly matching published transition-smoothness frontier was identified; as written it is an immediate specialization of thm:elbow rather than an independent result.
LuedtkeSofryginVanderLaanCarone2017 treats first-order sequential remainders and RobinsLiMukherjeeTchetgenVanderVaart2017 treats higher-order equations outside this recursive pseudo-outcome setting.
RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2008 provides the single-time higher-order nonlinear-functional benchmark to which the independent-transition submodel should reduce.

structure_flags.label: thm:upper-rate / thm:lower-rate / thm:elbow
structure_flags.one_line: The open matched-rate frontier is labeled as proved theorems despite status to-prove; make the main frontier a conjecture and state the unbuilt converse as an OEQ handle.

novelty_flags.label: thm:lower-rate
novelty_flags.one_line: The claimed chained legal-mixture converse gives no named perturbation family or lower-bound construction route, so its flagship use is capped at field until a nondegenerate transition-preserving witness is committed.

soundness_flags.label: def:markov-model / target_estimand
soundness_flags.one_line: P is declared an observed-data law but the model membership conditions quantify Y(1,1); define the class as observed laws admitting a full-data extension, or define P as a full-data law and take its observed pushforward.

soundness_flags.label: prop:single-time-reduction
soundness_flags.one_line: A pointwise condition on g cannot alter the minimax risk over the unrestricted class M; define and use the independent-transition submodel M_ind in the displayed minimax claim.

soundness_flags.label: ass:state-sufficiency-outcome and ass:state-sufficiency-treatment
soundness_flags.one_line: The two load-bearing novel state-sufficiency restrictions have only generic clinical/decision-state prose, not a cited or concrete setting establishing that H2 captures all earlier outcome and treatment-relevant history.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Main minimax frontier
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Claims are conditional on known smoothness indices, exact two-period Markov state sufficiency, and strict overlap; adaptation, longer horizons, and approximate state sufficiency are excluded.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The proposed rate and elbow apply only to the fixed-index two-period Markov class once the observed-law/full-data-law formulation is repaired.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace thm:lower-rate with an OEQ that explicitly names a chained fuzzy-hypothesis/two-convex-mixture route and specifies a nondegenerate transition-density perturbation family preserving normalization and state sufficiency.
Define the restricted independent-transition model M_ind and restate prop:single-time-reduction as its minimax rate, with the first-stage channel removed from both upper and lower constructions.
Ground the state-sufficiency class in a named longitudinal application or data-generating design, cite the corresponding Markov-state literature, and state observable construction criteria for H2.

After repairing the object and witness, promote the matched upper/lower frontier to one conjectural headline with explicit estimator and converse handles, retaining the elbow and separation as corollaries.

recommended_next_step: Revise the model-law typing, the independent-transition sanity submodel, and the open-kernel labeling; supply a concrete legal lower-bound route before advancing to Stage 0.
